stemHtml: The "irony of automation" is the paradox that automation does much better than the pilot those things that a pilot already knows how to do well. According to this paradox, the problem with automation is that it..

options.a: increases the workload of pilots as they have to cope with a lot of information.
options.b: excludes some aspects of flying needed in an emergency and that a pilot would like to be competent in.
options.c: reduces safety as pilots find automatic systems difficult to understand.
options.d: is less cost-effective compared to manual flying because the complex systems it uses are very expensive.
